Fields.Name: Behavior Variation ID
Fields.Description: Used when determining the action parameter ID to be referenced during an attack

Fields.Name: Sort ID
Fields.Description: Sort ID (-1: Do not collect) (7 digits is the limit in s32 to add the enhancement level in the program)

Fields.Name: Wandering Equip ID
Fields.Description: Replacement equipment ID for wandering ghosts.

Fields.Name: Weight
Fields.Description: Weight [kg].

Fields.Name: Weapon Weight %
Fields.Description:
Used in determining action cancel timing in TAE.
0 is soonest, 1 is latest.

Fields.Name: Repair Price
Fields.Description: This is the amount of souls it will take to fix this item.

Fields.Name: Base Reinforce Cost
Fields.Description:
The base soul cost it will take to reinforce this item.
Scales with each consecutive upgrade.

Fields.Name: Sell Value
Fields.Description: The souls given when this item is sold.

Fields.Name: Correction: STR
Fields.Description:
The base scaling value used for Strength.
Note that this is multiplied by reinforcement (via ReinforceParamWeapon).

Fields.Name: Correction: DEX
Fields.Description:
The base scaling value used for Dexterity.
Note that this is multiplied by reinforcement (via ReinforceParamWeapon).

Fields.Name: Correction: INT
Fields.Description:
The base scaling value used for Intelligence.
Note that this is multiplied by reinforcement (via ReinforceParamWeapon).

Fields.Name: Correction: FTH
Fields.Description:
The base scaling value used for Faith.
Note that this is multiplied by reinforcement (via ReinforceParamWeapon).

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption: Physical
Fields.Description: The Physical absorption to use when guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption: Magic
Fields.Description: The Magic absorption to use when guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption: Fire
Fields.Description: The Fire absorption to use when guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption: Lightning
Fields.Description: The Lightning absorption to use when guarding.

Fields.Name: Behavior Speffect ID 0
Fields.Description: The SpEffect to apply to the enemy on hit.

Fields.Name: Behavior Speffect ID 1
Fields.Description: The SpEffect to apply to the enemy on hit.

Fields.Name: Behavior Speffect ID 2
Fields.Description: The SpEffect to apply to the enemy on hit.

Fields.Name: Resident Speffect ID 0
Fields.Description: The SpEffect to apply passively to the player while holding the item in an active hand.

Fields.Name: Resident Speffect ID 1
Fields.Description: The SpEffect to apply passively to the player while holding the item in an active hand.

Fields.Name: Resident Speffect ID 2
Fields.Description: The SpEffect to apply passively to the player while holding the item in an active hand.

Fields.Name: Upgrade Material ID
Fields.Description: Determines the EquipMtrlSetParam row range used for reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier %: Type A (Demon)
Fields.Description: Damage multiplier for special attack A

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier %: Type B (Undead)
Fields.Description: Damage multiplier for special attack B

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier %: Type C (Hollow)
Fields.Description: Damage multiplier for special attack C

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier %: Type D (Abyssal)
Fields.Description: Damage multiplier for special attack D

Fields.Name: Weapon Model ID
Fields.Description: The part model ID. Determines the part model used by the weapon.

Fields.Name: Icon ID
Fields.Description: Menu icon ID.

Fields.Name: Durability Resistance
Fields.Description:
Determines how quickly durability is drained by attacking.
Lower is faster.

Fields.Name: Durability Max
Fields.Description: This the maximum durability, it will be shown in the game GUI

Fields.Name: Throw Escape Damage
Fields.Description: Basic value of throw-through attack power

Fields.Name: Parry Occurrence Duration
Fields.Description: Limit the life of parry damage. It does not last longer than it is set in TimeAct.

Fields.Name: Damage: Physical
Fields.Description:
The base Physical damage.
Note that this is multiplied by reinforcement (via ReinforceParamWeapon).

Fields.Name: Damage: Magic
Fields.Description:
The base Magic damage.
Note that this is multiplied by reinforcement (via ReinforceParamWeapon).

Fields.Name: Damage: Fire
Fields.Description:
The base Fire damage.
Note that this is multiplied by reinforcement (via ReinforceParamWeapon).

Fields.Name: Damage: Lightning
Fields.Description:
The base Lightning damage.
Note that this is multiplied by reinforcement (via ReinforceParamWeapon).

Fields.Name: Damage: Stamina
Fields.Description:
The base Stamina damage that is applied to an enemy when guarding.
Note that this is multiplied by reinforcement (via ReinforceParamWeapon).

Fields.Name: Damage: Poise
Fields.Description:
The base Poise damage.
Note that this is multiplied by reinforcement (via ReinforceParamWeapon).

Fields.Name: Poise Durability
Fields.Description: Additional SA durability used during attack motion

Fields.Name: Guard Angle
Fields.Description: Defense occurrence range angle when guarding weapons

Fields.Name: Guard Stability
Fields.Description: Defense against enemy stamina attacks when guarding successfully

Fields.Name: Reinforce Type ID
Fields.Description: Enhanced type ID

Fields.Name: Achievement ID [1]
Fields.Description: Is it related to the trophy system?

Fields.Name: Achievement ID [2]
Fields.Description: Trophy SEQ number (13-29)

Fields.Name: Critical Multiplier
Fields.Description: Throw attack power multiplier

Fields.Name: Bow Distance %
Fields.Description:
The bow distance added to ammunition range.
Value given is percent difference from 50.
Example: Value -30 gives 35 range ingame (50 + (50 * -0.3)) = 50 - 15 = 35

Fields.Name: Equip Model Category
Fields.Description: Equipment model type.

Fields.Name: Equip Model Gender
Fields.Description: Gender of equipment model.

Fields.Name: Weapon Category
Fields.Description: Determines the weapon category.

Fields.Name: Weapon Motion Category
Fields.Description: Determines the base moveset used by the weapon. Corresponds to TAE ID.

Fields.Name: Guard Motion Category
Fields.Description: Determines the moveset used whilst guarding.

Fields.Name: Attack Material
Fields.Description: Attack material used from attack para

Fields.Name: Defense SE Material 1
Fields.Description: Defense SE material used from attack para 1

Fields.Name: Correction Type - Physical
Fields.Description:
Determines the stat graph used for Physical damage (i.e. how effective a stat is).
Also affects STR/DEX portion of Spell Buff if applicable (Does not appear).

Fields.Name: Speical Attribute
Fields.Description: Weapon special attribute value

Fields.Name: Special Motion Category
Fields.Description: Determines the override moveset used by the weapon. Corresponds to TAE ID.

Fields.Name: Requirement: STR
Fields.Description: Equipment appropriate value.

Fields.Name: Requirement: DEX
Fields.Description: Equipment appropriate value.

Fields.Name: Requirement: INT
Fields.Description: Equipment appropriate value.

Fields.Name: Requirement: FTH
Fields.Description: Equipment appropriate value.

Fields.Name: Strength over Start Value
Fields.Description: Strength over start value

Fields.Name: Base Parry Attack
Fields.Description: If this is greater than defender's Parry Defense, the attack cannot be parried.

Fields.Name: Base Parry Defense
Fields.Description: If this is equal to or greater than attacker's Parry Attack, the attack can be parried.

Fields.Name: Base Guard Flick
Fields.Description: If this is greater than attacker's Flick Attack, the attack is deflected and damage is reduced by 50%.

Fields.Name: Base Flick Attack
Fields.Description:
If this is greater than defender's Passive/Guard Flick, the attack is not deflected.
AtkParam can modify this value.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption Bypass %
Fields.Description:
Percentage of target's current guard rate to bypass.
Guard bypass starts at 255 for 1 percent bypass to 156 for 100 percent bypass.
(Needs testing) Values of 1 to 100 will increase guarding effectiveness.

Fields.Name: Guard Level
Fields.Description: When guarding, which guard motion will the enemy attack? Decide

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption: Slash
Fields.Description: Looking at the attack type, what percentage of the damage of the slashing attribute is cut? Specify

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption: Strike
Fields.Description: Looking at the attack type, what percentage of the damage of the hit attribute is cut? Specify

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption: Thrust
Fields.Description: Looking at the attack type, what percentage of the damage of the piercing attribute is cut? Specify

Fields.Name: Guard Resist: Poison
Fields.Description: How much to cut the attack power to poison (set to the special effect parameter)

Fields.Name: Guard Resist: Toxic
Fields.Description: How much to cut the attack power (set as a special effect parameter) to make it a plague

Fields.Name: Guard Resist: Bleed
Fields.Description: How much to cut the attack power (set as a special effect parameter) to make bleeding

Fields.Name: Guard Resist: Curse
Fields.Description: How much to cut the attack power (set as a special effect parameter) to curse

Fields.Name: Attack Attribute
Fields.Description: Physical attribute 1

Fields.Name: Can wield in Right Hand
Fields.Description: Is it possible to equip it with the right hand?

Fields.Name: Can wield in Left Hand
Fields.Description: Is it possible to equip it with the left hand?

Fields.Name: Can wield in Both Hands
Fields.Description: Is it possible to equip with both hands?

Fields.Name: Can wield in Arrow Slot
Fields.Description: Is it possible to equip a bow bullet?

Fields.Name: Can wield in Bolt Slot
Fields.Description: Is it possible to equip a crossbow bullet?

Fields.Name: Enables Shield Buff
Fields.Description: Determines whether this weapon can be affected by shield buffs such as Magic Shield.

Fields.Name: Enables Parry
Fields.Description: Determines whether this weapon can parry (requires TAE support for actual effect).

Fields.Name: Enables Sorceries
Fields.Description:
Determines whether this weapon can cast Sorceries
Requires HKS or TAE support for actual effect.

Fields.Name: Enables Pyromancies
Fields.Description:
Determines whether this weapon can cast Pyromancies
Requires HKS or TAE support for actual effect.

Fields.Name: Enables Miracles
Fields.Description:
Determines whether this weapon can cast Miracles
Requires HKS or TAE support for actual effect.

Fields.Name: Enables Vow Magic
Fields.Description:
Determines whether this weapon can cast Vow Magic (Magic 4).
Requires HKS or TAE support for actual effect.

Fields.Name: Type Display: Normal
Fields.Description: Attack type for menu display. Is it normal?

Fields.Name: Type Display: Strike
Fields.Description: Attack type for menu display. Is it a blow?

Fields.Name: Type Display: Slash
Fields.Description: Attack type for menu display. Is it a slash?

Fields.Name: Type Display: Thrust
Fields.Description: Attack type for menu display. Is it a piercing?

Fields.Name: Is Buffable
Fields.Description: Determines whether this weapon can be buffed via SpEffects.

Fields.Name: Apply Hollowing Correction
Fields.Description: Is there an attack power correction by human nature?

Fields.Name: Is Reinforcable
Fields.Description: Listed in the enhancement target list at the enhancement shop (may be deleted due to specification changes?)

Fields.Name: Disable Base Change Reset
Fields.Description: Is job change reset prohibited?

Fields.Name: Repair is Disabled
Fields.Description: Is repair prohibited?

Fields.Name: Display Dark Hand Shield
Fields.Description: Allows Dark Hand shield VFX to display when Jumptable 85 is active.

Fields.Name: Is Simple Model for DLC
Fields.Description: Is there a simple model for DLC?

Fields.Name: Is a Light Source
Fields.Description: Is it a lantern weapon?

Fields.Name: Can Hit Ghost Enemy
Fields.Description: NPC Para's spirit body will now hit the opponent of . Also, the attack para Is it a ghost attack? Will be able to guard the attack of .

Fields.Name: Infusion E
Fields.Description: If E is true and A/B/C/D are false, this is an extra infusion with its own icon and event flag.

Fields.Name: Infusion F
Fields.Description: Technically infusion related but has no associated icons or event flags, so it's basically non-functional.

Fields.Name: Use Alternate Ammo
Fields.Description: Flags weapon/ammo to use alt set (i.e. greatbows and greatarrows).

Fields.Name: Item Acquisition Log Condition Type
Fields.Description: Whether to display in the item acquisition log when acquiring the item (not entered: )

Fields.Name: Enable Throw
Fields.Description: Whether it is a throwable weapon

Fields.Name: Item Acquisition Dialog Condition Type
Fields.Description: Whether to display it in the item acquisition dialog when acquiring an item (not entered: new only)

Fields.Name: Prevent Infusion Change
Fields.Description: Is it prohibited to change the magic stone attribute?

Fields.Name: Defense SFX Material 1
Fields.Description: Defensive SFX material used from attack para 1

Fields.Name: Weapon Collidable Type 0
Fields.Description: Weapon collaborative setting

Fields.Name: Weapon Collidable Type 1
Fields.Description: Weapon 1 collaborative setting

Fields.Name: Posture Control ID - Weapon Right
Fields.Description: Attitude control ID (right hand)

Fields.Name: Posture Control ID - Weapon Left
Fields.Description: Attitude control ID (left hand)

Fields.Name: Defense SFX Material [2]
Fields.Description: Defensive SFX material used from attack para 2

Fields.Name: Defense SE Material [2]
Fields.Description: Defense SE material used from attack para 2

Fields.Name: Weapon Sheath Position ID
Fields.Description: Weapon adsorption position parameter Id. This value determines the position where the weapon is attracted (-1: Refer to the value written directly in the old source code).

Fields.Name: Toughness Correction
Fields.Description: Determines the multiplier to apply to Toughness (when applied via InvokeToughness in TAE).

Fields.Name: Is Toughness Perfomed if Poise is Initial Value
Fields.Description: Whether the toughness calculation is performed even if the armor SA is the initial value. Check the toughness specification .xlsx for details

Fields.Name: Is Paired Weapon
Fields.Description:
This determines whether the item is a paired weapon.
Effects include enabling the L1 moveset when 2 handing and changing the animation played when 2 handing.
This animation can be changed or reverted in HKS.

Fields.Name: Is Auto Equipped
Fields.Description: Automatically equips the item when picked up, if slots are empty.

Fields.Name: Correction Type: Magic
Fields.Description:
Determines the stat graph used for Magic damage (i.e. how effective a stat is).
Also affects INT portion of Spell buff if applicable.

Fields.Name: Correction Type: Fire
Fields.Description: Determines the stat graph used for Fire damage (i.e. how effective a stat is).

Fields.Name: Correction Type: Lightning
Fields.Description:
Determines the stat graph used for Lightning damage (i.e. how effective a stat is).
Also affects FTH portion of Spell buff if applicable.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier %: Type E
Fields.Description: Damage multiplier for special attack E

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier %: Type F
Fields.Description: Damage multiplier for special attack F

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption: Dark
Fields.Description: The Dark absorption to use when guarding.

Fields.Name: Damage: Dark
Fields.Description:
The base Dark damage.
Note that this is multiplied by reinforcement (via ReinforceParamWeapon).

Fields.Name: Correction Type: Dark
Fields.Description: Determines the stat graph used for Dark damage (i.e. how effective a stat is).

Fields.Name: Correction Type: Poison
Fields.Description: Determines the stat graph used for Poison buildup (i.e. how effective a stat is).

Fields.Name: Weapon Art Anim ID
Fields.Description: Set to 99 for Torch to make it have No Skill. 0 otherwise.

Fields.Name: Correction Type: Bleed
Fields.Description: Determine the type of bleeding attack power correction graph with primary parameters

Fields.Name: Requirement: LCK
Fields.Description: Equipment appropriate value.

Fields.Name: Guard Resist: Frostbite
Fields.Description: How much to cut the attack power (set to the special effect parameter) to cool down

Fields.Name: Auto Replenish Type
Fields.Description: Controls whether or not to automatically replenish and default settings

Fields.Name: Sword Arts Param ID
Fields.Description: Arts parameter ID

Fields.Name: Correction: LCK
Fields.Description: Charapara correction value.

Fields.Name: Ammunition Equip ID
Fields.Description: Equipment number of the quiver (magazine) display model. In the case of a bow, it is displayed as a quiver, and in the case of a crossbow, it is displayed as a magazine.

Fields.Name: Derivation Level Type
Fields.Description: Type of how to set the enhancement level when returning or deriving a weapon

Fields.Name: Enchantment SFX Size
Fields.Description: Value offset to enchantment SfxId

Fields.Name: Weapon Class
Fields.Description: This is the weapon class displayed in the in-game menu. Reference ManuValueTableParam.

Fields.Description:
Max bonus possible. Scaling handled by CalcCorrectGraph 160.
Scales with DEX and is affected by DEX requirement.

Fields.Description:
Max bonus possible. Scaling handled by CalcCorrectGraph 161.
Scales with DEX and is affected by DEX requirement.

Fields.Description:
Max bonus possible. Scaling handled by CalcCorrectGraph 161.

Fields.Name: Reinforcement Menu Type
Fields.Description:
Determines what options are available when reinforcing weapons.
Handled through event flags/ESD.

Fields.Name: Max Ammunition Held
Fields.Description: Maximum number of arrows

Fields.Name: Hide Resident VFX 1 when Sheathed
Fields.Description: If Do you want to display when resident SFX1 is delivered? Is true, hide the SFX set to resident SFX ID1 when the weapon is delivered.

Fields.Name: Hide Resident VFX 2 when Sheathed
Fields.Description: If Do you want to display when resident SFX2 is delivered? Is true, hide the SFX set to resident SFX ID2 when the weapon is delivered.

Fields.Name: Hide Resident VFX 3 when Sheathed
Fields.Description: If Do you want to display when resident SFX3 is delivered? Is true, hide the SFX set to resident SFX ID3 when the weapon is delivered.

Fields.Name: Hide Resident VFX 4 when Sheathed
Fields.Description: If Do you want to display when resident SFX4 is delivered? Is true, hide the SFX set to resident SFX ID 4 when the weapon is delivered.

Fields.Description: Whether the vfx parameter Soul Param ID for Weapon Enchantment and Invisible Weapon for Weapon Enchantment settings are applied
